---
name: New Provider Request
about: Request support for a new tracking provider
title: '[Provider] '
labels: provider
assignees: ''
---

**Provider Name**
Name of the tracking/analytics provider.

**Website**
URL of the provider's website.

**Example Request URL**
A real example of a tracking request URL from this provider.

**Documentation**
Link to the provider's tracking documentation (if available).

**Parameters to Decode**
Which parameters from the request should be decoded?
- Parameter 1: description
- Parameter 2: description

**Category**
Which category does this provider belong to?
- [ ] Analytics
- [ ] Tag Manager
- [ ] Marketing & Advertising
- [ ] Session Replay
- [ ] A/B Testing
- [ ] Visitor Identification
- [ ] Customer Engagement
- [ ] CDP
- [ ] Adobe Stack
- [ ] Other:
